message:
test(runtime_math): add golden kernel snapshot fixture and sha256sums

Initial committed golden fixture for the runtime_math kernel snapshot
regression gate:

- kernel_snapshot_smoke.v1.json: 262-line deterministic snapshot captured
  with seed=0xDEAD_BEEF, steps=512, mode=both. Contains strict and hardened
  mode snapshots with all RuntimeKernelSnapshot fields (schema_version=1).
  This fixture is the source of truth for snapshot_gate.sh sha256 checks.

- sha256sums.txt: Single sha256 checksum for the golden fixture file,
  used by snapshot_gate.sh for binary-exact regression detection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
